zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor de Bohun於1241年之前出生在英國英格蘭艾可德布登時，她的父親Earl Humphrey IV de Bohun32歲，母親Maud de Lusignan31歲。她於1244年8月14日之前與Sir John de Verdun, Baron of Westmeath在英國英格蘭賀福爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1278年6月12日之後在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾阿頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor de Bohun于1241年之前出生在英国英格兰艾可德布登时，她的父亲Earl Humphrey IV de Bohun32岁，母亲Maud de Lusignan31岁。她于1244年8月14日之前与Sir John de Verdun, Baron of Westmeath在英国英格兰賀福爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1278年6月12日之后在英国英格兰斯塔福爾阿頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bohun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Moon
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Moyon in La Manche. Compare   Mounce  .
Americanized form of German   Mohn   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor de Bohun was born before 1241, in Debden, Essex, England, United Kingdom, her father, Earl Humphrey IV de Bohun, was 32 and her mother, Maud de Lusignan, was 31. She married Sir John de Verdun, Baron of Westmeath before 14 August 1244, in Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died after 12 June 1278, in Alton, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor de Bohun est née avant 1241, à Debden, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Earl Humphrey IV de Bohun, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Maud de Lusignan, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John de Verdun, Baron of Westmeath avant 14 août 1244, à Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée après 12 juin 1278, à Alton, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor de Bohun è nata il prima del 1241 nel Debden, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Earl Humphrey IV de Bohun, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Maud de Lusignan, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Sir John de Verdun, Baron of Westmeath prima del 14 agosto 1244, nel Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 12 giugno 1278, nel Alton, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor de Bohunが1241年以前にイギリスイギリスエセックスデブデンで生まれた時，父Earl Humphrey IV de Bohunは32歳，母Maud de Lusignanは31歳であった。1244年8月14日以前にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアでSir John de Verdun, Baron of Westmeathと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1278年6月12日以後にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアアルトンで死去した。

ko.Warwick Castle-Warwick, Warwickshire, ,: 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 워윅 워윅 카스틀
ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor de Bohun(이)가 1241년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 데브든에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Earl Humphrey IV de Bohun(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud de Lusignan(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1244년 8월 14일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르에서 Sir John de Verdun, Baron of Westmeath(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1278년 6월 12일 이후 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 알턴에서 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Sir John de Verdun, Baron of Westmeath antes 14 de agosto de 1244, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. ru.Warwick Castle-Warwick, Warwickshire, ,: варвикк кастл, варвикк, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor de Bohun родилась перед 1241 г. в местности дебден, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Earl Humphrey IV de Bohun было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Maud de Lusignan, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John de Verdun, Baron of Westmeath перед 14 августа 1244 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла после 12 июнь 1278 г. в местности алтон, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания.
